name: Hot and Spicy Almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Melt the butter in a medium-sized saucepan over low heat.
3. Add Worcestershire sauce, ground cumin, sugar, garlic powder, and cayenne pepper to the melted butter. Stir until well combined.
4. Add the whole natural almonds to the saucepan and stir to coat evenly with the seasoning mixture.
5. Spread the almonds on an ungreased baking sheet in a single layer.
6. Toast the almonds in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally to ensure even cooking.
7. Remove from the oven and toss with coarse salt.
8. Allow to cool completely before serving.
